summary.intent: Fix PR review comments on PR #663 in the moltis repository, specifically replacing a forbidden `Mutex<()>` with an appropriate alternative.
summary.outcome: Replaced `Mutex<()>` with `tokio::sync::Semaphore` (1 permit) in crates/chat/src/lib.rs, passed clippy, tests, and formatting checks, then committed and pushed the fix.

repo: CLAUDE.md explicitly forbids `Mutex<()>` usage; the approved alternative is `tokio::sync::Semaphore` with 1 permit.
Greptile is used as an automated PR reviewer and flags policy violations as P2 issues.

code.finding: `tokio::sync::Semaphore` was already imported in this file, so no new import was needed when replacing `Mutex<()>`.

workflow: PR comments from Greptile can be resolved programmatically after pushing the fix.
The check-pr skill is used to inspect PR review comments before acting on them.
Clippy, tests, and format checks are all run before committing a fix.

friction: Initial semaphore replacement caused a duplicate import issue (Semaphore already in scope), requiring a follow-up edit.
